action.reasoning: Observation: All previous controllers failed because robot never moved under the action dict format from Quick-start. env.action_space shows a Dict of Dicts (agent_0_base_velocity → {agent_0_base_vel: Box(2,)}), suggesting the correct format maps agent action name to a sub-dict of args. We must confirm movement (position + orientation) with this correct format. Only then can we implement a working controller. Decision: Write diag_action4.py to test dict-of-dicts format, print sample action, step, and check position/quaternion changes. Run immediately to see if turning/forward works. No eval this iteration.
